name: @memberjunction/ai-bridge-webex
description: MemberJunction: Cisco Webex Realtime Bridge driver. Connects the realtime agent engine to a Webex meeting (audio in/out, diarized roster, participant mute, Webex meeting chat) via an injectable Cisco Webex Meetings SDK seam (Webex Meetings SDK / xAPI / Webex bot framework), and contributes a Meeting Controls facilitator channel.
author: MemberJunction.com
